segment.source: Renders a heading and subheadline above a grid of cards, each contact item showing an icon, a label heading and a value that becomes a link when one is set (tel, mailto, map). Use it for: quick-reference contact facts extracted from a document — address, phone, email, fax, support hotline. Prefer 'Contact Form Block' when the section also needs a message form; 'Office Locations' for several sites; 'Office Hours' for opening times.
